# sedai_create_datadog_monitoring_provider (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# Datadog monitoring provider
resource "sedai_create_datadog_monitoring_provider" "datadog_mp" {
  account_id       = sedai_create_account.eks_account.id
  integration_type = sedai_create_account.eks_account.integration_type
  api_key          = "api_key"
  application_key  = "application_key"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String)
- `api_key` (String)
- `application_key` (String)

### Optional

- `app_dimensions` (List of String)
- `az_dimensions` (List of String)
- `cluster_dimensions` (List of String)
- `container_dimensions` (List of String)
- `env_dimensions` (List of String)
- `instance_dimensions` (List of String)
- `integration_type` (String)
- `lb_dimensions` (List of String)
- `name` (String)
- `namespace_dimensions` (List of String)
- `region_dimensions` (List of String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
